artists.name: Aurora Lane
artists.description: Indie pop singer-songwriter known for bright, melodic hooks and introspective lyrics.

artists.name: Midnight Static
artists.description: Electronic duo blending synthwave textures with modern EDM production.

artists.name: Riverstones
artists.description: Alternative rock band featuring layered guitars and anthemic choruses.

artists.name: Elena Morales Trio
artists.description: Contemporary jazz trio led by pianist Elena Morales, blending Latin and modern jazz.

artists.name: Northern Echoes
artists.description: Post-rock ensemble known for expansive, cinematic instrumentals.

artists.name: DJ Solace
artists.description: Electronic producer focused on chill, downtempo, and lo-fi house grooves.

artists.name: Brassline Collective
artists.description: Large jazz-funk ensemble with horn-heavy arrangements and live energy.

artists.name: Evelyn Choi
artists.description: Classical pianist specializing in Romantic and early 20th-century repertoire.

artists.name: Orion Skies
artists.description: Progressive rock band known for concept albums and extended live jams.

artists.name: Lo-Fi Lounge
artists.description: Collective of producers crafting mellow, instrumental beats for study and relaxation.

artists.name: Crimson Harbor
artists.description: Hard rock band with driving riffs and powerful vocals, popular for live concerts.

artists.name: Blue Notation
artists.description: Straight-ahead jazz quartet revisiting classic standards with a modern touch.

artists.name: Sylvia Hart
artists.description: Singer-songwriter blending acoustic pop with subtle electronic textures.

artists.name: City Lights Ensemble
artists.description: Modern classical chamber group featuring strings, piano, and electronics.

artists.name: Neon Runner
artists.description: High-energy EDM artist focused on festival-ready anthems and remixes.

artists.name: Luna String Quartet
artists.description: Classical string quartet performing both traditional and contemporary works.

artists.name: Sapphire Wave
artists.description: Dream-pop band with lush vocals and reverb-drenched guitars.

artists.name: Jasper King
artists.description: Blues-rock guitarist and vocalist with soulful improvisations.

artists.name: Electric Tempo
artists.description: Electronic collective producing techno and house tracks for clubs.

artists.name: Horizon Choir
artists.description: Contemporary choral group performing classical and cinematic arrangements.

genres.name: Pop
genres.description: Popular music with catchy melodies and broad mainstream appeal.

genres.name: Rock
genres.description: Guitar-driven music ranging from classic rock to hard and progressive styles.

genres.name: Jazz
genres.description: Improvisational music style including swing, bebop, and contemporary jazz.

genres.name: Classical
genres.description: Orchestral and chamber music from Baroque to contemporary composers.

genres.name: Electronic
genres.description: Synthesizer-based music including EDM, ambient, and experimental styles.

genres.name: Hip-Hop
genres.description: Rhythmic music featuring rap vocals, beats, and sampling.

mood_tags.description: Steady, non-intrusive tracks designed to aid concentration.

subscription_plans.name: Individual Standard
subscription_plans.description: Ad-free music streaming for a single listener with standard audio quality.

subscription_plans.description: Family plan with up to 5 accounts and offline downloads on all devices.

subscription_plans.description: Enhanced family plan with up to 6 accounts, offline downloads, and high-fidelity audio.

bundles.title: Pop Duo Starter Pack: Aurora Lane & Sylvia Hart
bundles.description: A pop-focused bundle featuring breakout albums from Aurora Lane and Sylvia Hart, including bonus singles and remixes.

bundles.title: Rock Essentials Collection
bundles.description: A curated collection of modern rock albums and live tracks from Crimson Harbor, Riverstones, Orion Skies, and Jasper King.

bundles.title: Jazz Club Nights
bundles.description: Late-night jazz sessions from Elena Morales Trio, Brassline Collective, and Blue Notation, perfect for intimate listening.

bundles.title: Classical Piano Focus
bundles.description: A focused set of classical piano recordings by Evelyn Choi alongside chamber works by City Lights Ensemble.

bundles.title: Electronic Morning Run Mix
bundles.description: High-energy electronic albums and tracks from Neon Runner, DJ Solace, and Electric Tempo, optimized for running playlists.

bundles.title: Family Rock Concert Night
bundles.description: Four full-length rock concert videos from Crimson Harbor, Riverstones, Orion Skies, and Northern Echoes for an at-home festival.

bundles.title: Rock Concert Boxset (HD)
bundles.description: HD recordings of three blockbuster rock concerts, including exclusive bonus tracks and behind-the-scenes footage.

bundles.title: Jazz & Chill Sessions
bundles.description: A blend of laid-back jazz and chill electronic beats from Elena Morales Trio, Lo-Fi Lounge, and DJ Solace.

bundles.title: Modern Classical Collection
bundles.description: Contemporary classical works from Luna String Quartet, Horizon Choir, and City Lights Ensemble.

bundles.title: EDM Festival Headliners
bundles.description: Festival-ready EDM sets and singles from Neon Runner and Electric Tempo, plus exclusive remixes.

bundles.title: Lo-Fi Study Sessions
bundles.description: Extended lo-fi and focus-oriented tracks from Lo-Fi Lounge and Northern Echoes for deep work.

bundles.title: Mixed Genre Starter Kit
bundles.description: A genre-spanning starter bundle with pop, rock, jazz, classical, and electronic albums to explore the catalog.

concert_videos.title: Crimson Harbor: Live in Berlin (HD)
concert_videos.description: A high-energy rock concert recorded at Berlin Arena featuring Crimson Harbor's biggest hits and extended solos.

concert_videos.title: Crimson Harbor: Unplugged Acoustic Sessions
concert_videos.description: An intimate acoustic set showcasing stripped-down versions of Crimson Harbor's heaviest songs.

concert_videos.title: Riverstones: Arena Nights Tour
concert_videos.description: Riverstones perform their Arena Nights tour with immersive visuals and a career-spanning setlist.

concert_videos.title: Orion Skies: Progressive Epic Live
concert_videos.description: A concept-driven live performance by Orion Skies, featuring full-album renditions and extended instrumental passages.

concert_videos.title: Jasper King: Blues Night Live
concert_videos.description: Guitarist Jasper King delivers a soulful blues-rock performance recorded at the Royal Theatre.

concert_videos.title: Northern Echoes: Live in Iceland
concert_videos.description: Post-rock ensemble Northern Echoes perform an atmospheric set in a remote Icelandic venue.

concert_videos.title: Elena Morales Trio: Live at the Jazz Club
concert_videos.description: A warm, intimate recording of Elena Morales Trio exploring Latin-infused jazz standards and originals.

concert_videos.title: Brassline Collective: Summer Fest Live
concert_videos.description: Horn-driven jazz-funk from Brassline Collective recorded at the annual Summer Fest open-air stage.

concert_videos.title: Evelyn Choi: Moonlit Piano Recital
concert_videos.description: Classical pianist Evelyn Choi performs Romantic-era favorites and Impressionist gems in an evening recital.

concert_videos.title: Luna String Quartet: Evening of Strings
concert_videos.description: Luna String Quartet presents a program of classical and contemporary works in an acoustically rich hall.

concert_videos.title: Neon Runner: Festival Mainstage Set
concert_videos.description: A high-octane EDM festival set from Neon Runner, packed with crowd favorites and unreleased tracks.

concert_videos.title: DJ Solace: Rooftop Sessions
concert_videos.description: Chilled downtempo and house grooves from DJ Solace recorded live at a sunset rooftop party.

albums.title: Sunrise Echoes
albums.description: A bright pop debut from Aurora Lane featuring catchy choruses, shimmering synths, and reflective lyrics about new beginnings.

albums.title: City Lights
albums.description: Sylvia Hart blends acoustic guitars with subtle electronic textures on this urban-influenced pop album about late-night city life.

albums.title: Heavy Tides
albums.description: Hard-hitting rock anthems from Crimson Harbor with massive riffs, thunderous drums, and sing-along choruses.

albums.title: Midnight Drive
albums.description: An atmospheric rock record built around moody guitars and driving rhythms, perfect for late-night highway listening.

albums.title: Stars and Stories
albums.description: A concept album from Orion Skies weaving progressive rock epics with a sci-fi narrative across the stars.

albums.title: Blues Fire
albums.description: Blistering blues-rock guitar jams and soulful ballads showcasing Jasper King’s virtuosic playing.

albums.title: Midnight Sessions
albums.description: Late-night jazz trio recordings with warm piano, lyrical bass lines, and subtle Latin rhythms.

albums.title: Live at the Park
albums.description: A lively outdoor set from Brassline Collective, blending jazz, funk, and soul with crowd-pleasing horn arrangements.

albums.title: After Hours
albums.description: Smooth small-club jazz sessions featuring sax-led melodies and late-night ballads.

albums.title: Moonlit Sonatas
albums.description: Evelyn Choi interprets beloved piano sonatas in an intimate, atmospheric recording.

albums.title: Impressionist Reflections
albums.description: A collection of shimmering Impressionist piano works highlighting color and texture.

albums.title: Urban Suite
albums.description: Modern classical pieces for chamber ensemble inspired by the rhythms and sounds of the city.

albums.title: Night Sprint
albums.description: High-energy EDM anthems and festival drops designed to keep the crowd moving until dawn.

albums.title: Rooftop Chill
albums.description: Laid-back house and downtempo grooves perfect for sunset rooftop sessions and relaxed evenings.

albums.title: Club Circuits
albums.description: Peak-time techno and house tracks built around hypnotic synth lines and deep bass.

albums.title: Café Beats
albums.description: Warm, crackling lo-fi instrumentals curated for studying, reading, and quiet cafés.

albums.title: Horizons
albums.description: Expansive post-rock soundscapes from Northern Echoes, building from quiet ambience to towering climaxes.

albums.title: Modern Strings
albums.description: Contemporary works for string quartet, balancing lush harmonies with bold rhythmic ideas.

albums.title: Celestial Voices
albums.description: A choral journey through modern sacred and cinematic works performed by Horizon Choir.

albums.title: Afterglow
albums.description: Aurora Lane’s upcoming sophomore pop album, pairing euphoric hooks with more mature, introspective themes.
